features.name: dfflegalize target cell type not preserved through techmap
features.description: Code should include a DFFSR cell with dfflegalize targeting $_DFFSR_NNN_ cell type where the tool incorrectly infers $_DFFSR_NPN_ with combinational logic instead

features.name: negated polarity in legalized DFF cell output
features.description: Code should include a DFFSR with all negedge (active-low) control signals where techmap produces incorrect mixed-polarity cell with combinational logic compensation
